title: Packaging material
abstract: There is provided a material (20) including a first, outer layer (22) and second, inner layer (24) bonded together with an adhesive (26). The inner layer (24) forms a protective layer configured to protect an item packaged by the material (20). The outer layer (22) forms an external surface of the packaged item. The outer layer (22) and inner layer (24) include perforations along main track (32, 34) which allow a user to selectively remove portions of the material (20) to a desired size according to the size of the item to be packaged. The inner layer (24) includes further perforations along sub-track (38) which, in use, allow portions of the inner layer (24) to be removed to expose a portion of the adhesive layer (26) remaining on the first layer (22). The portion of the first layer (22) including the exposed portion of adhesive (26) can be attached to another portion of the material (20) to allow an item to be packaged or wrapped accordingly.
